flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Elon University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.7k → $47.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Elon University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.7k → $47.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Elon University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Elon University are 63% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($74.5k vs $45.7k).
